testCases.label: LED Headlamp — FAIL (missing auto-leveling, beam cutoff borderline)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2026 Model X SUV. Front lighting: LED projector headlamps, no auto-leveling system installed. Mounting height: 650mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.55 degrees. Color temperature: 5500K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

expected.primaryFailure: R48 §5.11 — auto-leveling mandatory for LED light sources

testCases.label: LED Headlamp — PASS (auto-leveling present, all values within limits)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2026 Model Y Sedan. Front lighting: LED projector headlamps with automatic leveling system (confirmed functional). Mounting height: 720mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.42 degrees. Color temperature: 5200K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

testCases.label: LED Headlamp — FAIL (beam cutoff exceeds limit)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2025 Model Z Hatchback. Front lighting: LED reflector headlamps with auto-leveling. Mounting height: 580mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.62 degrees. Color temperature: 4800K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

expected.primaryFailure: R112 §5.3 — beam cutoff angle 0.62 exceeds 0.57 limit

testCases.label: LED Headlamp — FAIL (mounting height below minimum)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2025 Low-Rider Coupe (modified suspension). Front lighting: LED projector headlamps with auto-leveling. Mounting height: 440mm from ground (lowered suspension). Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.38 degrees. Color temperature: 5000K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

testCases.label: Halogen Headlamp — PASS (no auto-leveling required)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2024 Base Model Van. Front lighting: Halogen H4 reflector headlamps, manual leveling (rotary switch in cabin). Mounting height: 900mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.51 degrees. Color temperature: 3800K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

expected.notes: Halogen source — R48 §5.11 auto-leveling does not apply

testCases.label: LED Headlamp — FAIL (color temperature exceeds 6000K)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2025 Aftermarket-Tuned Coupe. Front lighting: LED projector headlamps with auto-leveling (aftermarket retrofit). Mounting height: 610mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.45 degrees. Color temperature: 6800K (blue-tinted aftermarket bulbs). Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

testCases.label: LED Headlamp — FAIL (multiple issues: no auto-leveling + beam cutoff fail)
testCases.message: Vehicle: 2023 Budget EV Hatchback. Front lighting: LED reflector headlamps, no auto-leveling system. Mounting height: 520mm from ground. Measured beam cutoff angle: 0.61 degrees. Color temperature: 5900K. Check compliance for EU VWTA type approval.

expected.primaryFailure: R48 §5.11 — auto-leveling mandatory for LED, R112 §5.3 — beam cutoff exceeds limit
